event: View of the Stock Exchange colonnade and Peter and Paul Fortress in St. Petersburg
description: A print showing a view from behind massive white classical columns of a colonnade on the left, looking across a stone embankment toward a distant cityscape. A tall golden spire of a fortress or cathedral rises above the low skyline of buildings and trees. Small figures walk along the embankment. The palette is muted — pale columns against a gray-blue sky with warm accents on the distant architecture.

_meta.title: Colonnade of Exchange and Peter and Paul Fortress
